transcript: Speaker A (AI Avatar): Let's start your mock interview. Tell me about yourself. Speaker B (Human): Umm... myself Rahul. I am passout from Mumbai University. Speaker A (AI Avatar): Good try, but let's make this more professional. Say 'I am Rahul, and I graduated from Mumbai University'. Speaker B (Human): I am Rahul, and I graduated from Mumbai University. Interview cha darr ata kadhun taka. SpeakX AI aahe na, to tumchya chuka lagech correct karto. Te pan bina judge karta. Crack your next interview. First 20 questions bilkul free. Download SpeakX now. [Get rid of interview fear now. SpeakX AI is here, it corrects your mistakes instantly. That too without judging. Crack your next interview. First 20 questions absolutely free. Download SpeakX now.]
on_screen_text: Let's start your mock interview. Tell me about yourself. Umm... myself rahul. I am passout from Mumbai University. Good try but let's make this Professional. Say I am rahul and I graduated from mumbai university. I am rahul. Mumbai University. Interview cha darr ata sampala [Interview fear is now gone]. Your Daily Practice Goal. Crack your next interview. First 20 question Bilkul free [Absolutely free]. Speak english naturally. SpeakX. Download now.
summary: An AI avatar conducts a mock interview with a candidate, correcting his English introduction in real-time. The candidate then explains in Marathi how SpeakX AI helps eliminate interview fear by correcting mistakes without judgment. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app, highlighting that the first 20 questions are free.
